tools.name: get_studio_info
tools.title: Get studio info
tools.description: Return core information about Yoga Zeeburg: name, address, neighbourhood, positioning, and intro pass details.

tools.name: suggest_class_direction
tools.title: Suggest a class direction
tools.description: Suggest which type of Yoga Zeeburg class fits how someone feels today (slow down, move, stiff, new to yoga). Does not return real class names or a live schedule.

mood.description: Free-text description of how the person feels, what they want, or their experience level.

tools.name: get_directions_link
tools.title: Get directions to studio
tools.description: Return a Google Maps directions link to Yoga Zeeburg (Cruquiusweg 96F, Amsterdam), optionally from a given starting address.

from.description: Optional starting address or place name.
